title: Reset/reload email from specific date
excerpt:

posts.author: jbowman (Jeff Bowman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Due to recent issues with gmail and my gmail integrations, I had not received any email items to my board for the last week to 10 days.

Is there a method to trigger the gmail integration to reload items back to a specific date? If not, please consider this a request for such a method. It wouldn’t be a “recipe” type items, more of an option when the integration was modified like when the UPDATE is (or even outside of the integrations , like as an an Admin task).
